name: Very Fair
description: Always burns, never tans. Light skin, light eyes, freckles.

name: Fair
description: Burns easily, tans minimally. Light skin, light eyes.

name: Medium
description: Sometimes burns, gradually tans. Medium skin.

name: Olive
description: Rarely burns, tans easily. Olive/brown skin.

name: Brown
description: Very rarely burns, tans darkly. Brown skin.
